points.title: Points
points.pointsSystemDescription: Collect and redeem points in our loyalty program to unlock exciting rewards and exclusive perks. Earned points can be used for payment of future purchases.
points.questDescription: Our loyalty program turns your shopping into a rewarding journey. Earn points and unlock challenges with every order or interaction!
points.historyDescription: Detailed record of all the points you've earned or redeemed through the loyalty program.
points.nextTierRequirementSuffix: total spent on completed order to unlock next level.
